title: Insurance Marketing Firm
description: IRDAI (Registration of Insurance Marketing Firm) Regulations, 2015 (IMF Regulations) were notified in the Gazette on 21.01.2015. The Authority launched an online portal on 26th May, 2015 for facilitating the applicants to submit their applications through portal. The basic functions of the department are as follows.Know More
source_name: Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India
